text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... All right, that's ten laps.
choice_data_list:
Then we've finished this morning's training.
Good job.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aw c'mon, that was barely a warm-up. I feel like I could do ten more!
choice_data_list: But we've got training in the afternoon too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of the summer training program, right when racers
start to get worn out. The blazing sun and white-hot sand don't help
with the exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so close to breakin' my old records. If I don't push through,
How'm I s'posed to forge my body into a racin' machine?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanna go all out today!
choice_data_list:
Okay, but let's ramp up our routine one lap at a
time.

Okay, but let's ramp up our routine one lap at a
time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Works for me! 'Kay, be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Tamamo Cross is feeling extra motivated today. With that
in mind, I lead her through an extra intense afternoon training session.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah, there ya are! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wanna check out the nearby festival? You're free right now,
yeah?
choice_data_list: Yup!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Awesome. Actually, I was thinkin' I'd give that whole treatin' yaself
thing another try.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I worked my butt off today, didn't I? That regimen of yours
was enough for two days... So you know...
choice_data_list: Exactly, you deserve a reward!
Exactly, you deserve a reward!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I mean, if you say so, then that settles it. I'm treatin' myself!
choice_data_list: So what would you like?
So what would you like?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wanna walk around and stuff my face with festival food! I've wanted
to do that ever since I was a kid! Those stalls better watch out, 'cause
here I come!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmmm what to get... It all looks so good!

text_block_list.name: Festival Man
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate bananas! Get your chocolate bananas here! Special deal!
Win a game of rock, paper, scissors and get a second one for free!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate bananas! That sounds pretty good, but maybe I should get
somethin' with more substance...
choice_data_list: What happened to stuffing your face?
What happened to stuffing your face?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right, but... shouldn't I spend my money more... wisely?
choice_data_list: Then could you go buy me one?
Then could you go buy me one?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ah, you suck at rock, paper, scissors, huh? All right, leave it to
me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll take one chocolate banana, please!

text_block_list.name: Festival Man
text_block_list.text: Comin' right up! But before that... rock, paper...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Scissors!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I won! I got you two chocolate bananas, Trainer!
choice_data_list: You won, so I think you deserve the other one.
You won, so I think you deserve the other one.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah... Guess that's only fair... Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whoa! Lookit, they've got doteyaki!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
White miso paste?! No way, most joints in and around Tokyo use the
mixed stuff or soy sauce... We gotta eat here!

text_block_list.name: Festival Woman
text_block_list.text:
Dis girl gets it! Dis here's the real deal! How'd ya like a little snack,
kiddo?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, my dad's always eatin' stuff like this... Hey, wait, who're ya
callin' kiddo?!

text_block_list.name: Festival Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I thought ya were in elementary school. My bad, my bad. How
'bout a bowl on da house?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What? Really?! Ah, then how 'bout ya gimme two, and I'll pay ya half
price?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... These beef tendons meltin' in my mouth... The subtle
sweetness of the miso paste... I'm in paradise!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now this is a worthwhile purchase! Two doteyaki for the price of one! Feels like I'm back home!
choice_data_list:
I'll take a bowl of simmered beef tendon,
please.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, nice choice! If I'm vouchin' for this place's authenticity, ya
know it's good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Next up is... takoyaki! You want some?
choice_data_list:
I don't know if I could eat a whole order by
myself...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Then let's split one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After receiving our order of takoyaki, we both dig in.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Where's the octopus? This takoyaki's all dough.
choice_data_list: Yup. It's festival takoyaki, all right.
Yup. It's festival takoyaki, all right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess you weren't expectin' much either, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I never got it before. Why would people buy takoyaki at
festivals when legit takoyaki joints are much better?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I think I get it now. It's the atmosphere, right? It adds this extra flavor
you can't get anywhere else.
choice_data_list: I think you're right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Right? But ya know, if I hadn't tried these takoyaki, I woulda kept on
wonderin' that for the rest of my life.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Guess the same goes for treatin' myself too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the point of these little treats, right? Sometimes you need a
little break if you wanna go even higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross looks up to the sky as she continues.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya know what I thought after eatin' pancakes with ya? "I wanna eat
'em again."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Pancake mix's always been enough for me, but now? It's like that
cafe's pancakes are a goal for me to reach.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta work hard if I wanna eat 'em, right? So this whole treatin'
myself business works as motivation too!
choice_data_list: Y-yeah, I suppose so.
Y-yeah, I suppose so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All I wanted was to see her reward herself more often, but it seems
she's taken it as a way to improve herself. That's Tamamo Cross for
you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And ya know what? Now I know 'bout all sorts of tasty things! Things I
can show my family!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Maybe next time... I'll be able to actually buy my parents an anniversary gift myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to the day we went shopping. Tamamo Cross was so
overwhelmed by the prices that she actually ran away, so I picked
something out for her.
choice_data_list: You just need more experience!
You just need more experience!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Which is why I gotta keep givin' myself treats every once in a
while. I'll be countin' on your help, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but no expensive chocolates, please. Just walkin' 'round and
eatin' street food is luxurious enough for me.
choice_data_list:
You didn't actually spend that much money
though.

You didn't actually spend that much money
though.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Of course I didn't! Ya think dis proud Naniwa racer would ever pay askin' price for somethin'?! I'm not touchin' it unless I know it's a steal!
choice_data_list: Yeah, hometown pride!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You got that right! And that pride is what's gonna take me to the top,
with pit stops for treats along the way!
